zh.lifeSummary: 當John Standish於1286年出生在英國藍卡爾斯坦迪什時，他的父親William De Standish30歲，母親Margaret Euxton22歲。他於1310年與Margaret de Everingham在英國英格蘭藍卡爾斯坦迪什結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1350年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾斯坦迪什享年64歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾斯坦迪什。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Standish于1286年出生在英国藍卡爾斯坦迪什时，他的父亲William De Standish30岁，母亲Margaret Euxton22岁。他于1310年与Margaret de Everingham在英国英格兰藍卡爾斯坦迪什结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1350年在英国英格兰藍卡爾斯坦迪什享年64岁，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾斯坦迪什。

nameMeanings.name: Standish
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Standish (Lancashire, now part of Greater Manchester), from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + edisc ‘enclosure, enclosed park’. Standish (Gloucestershire) does not appear to have contributed towards the surname.

History: Myles Standish (c. 1584–1656) was a soldier of fortune, from 1620 captain of the Mayflower Pilgrims at Plymouth Colony. Little is known of his origins and early life, but in his will he claimed to be descended from a leading Catholic family, the Standishes of Standish, Lancashire, England. He also claimed to have been deprived of his inheritance, a claim not confirmed.

variants.name: Standage
meanings: in Leicestershire and Buckinghamshire, the name may alternatively be from Stanedge Grange in Hartington Nether Quarter or Stanage End in Outseats (both Derbyshire); but evidence is needed for this. The placenames derive from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + ecg ‘edge, escarpment’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John Standish was born in 1286, in Standish, Lancashire, England, his father, William De Standish, was 30 and his mother, Margaret Euxton, was 22. He married Margaret de Everingham in 1310, in Standish, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1350, in Standish, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64, and was buried in Standish, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Standish est né en 1286, à Standish, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, William De Standish, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Margaret Euxton, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Margaret d’Everingham en 1310, à Standish, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1350, à Standish, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Standish, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Standish 1286 in Standish, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William De Standish 30 und seine Mutter Margaret Euxton 22. Er hat 1310 in Standish, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Margaret de Everingham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1350 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Standish, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Standish, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Standish è nato il nel 1286 nel Standish, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, William De Standish, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Euxton, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Everingham nel 1310, nel Standish, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1350, nel Standish, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Standish, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Standishが1286年にイギリスランカシュアイアスタンディッシュで生まれた時，父William De Standishは30歳，母Margaret Euxtonは22歳であった。1310年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアスタンディッシュでMargaret de Everinghamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1350年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアスタンディッシュで64歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアスタンディッシュにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Standish(이)가 1286년 영국 랭카실르 스탠디시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William De Standish(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Euxton(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1310년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 스탠디시에서 Margaret de Everingham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1350년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 스탠디시에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 스탠디시에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Standish nasceu em 1286, em Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William De Standish, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Euxton, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Everingham em 1310, em Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1350, em Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Standish родился в 1286 г. в местности стандиш, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени William De Standish было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Euxton, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Everingham в 1310 г. в местности стандиш, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1350 г. в местности стандиш, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности стандиш, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Standish nació en 1286, en Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, William De Standish, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Margaret Euxton, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Margaret de Everingham en 1310, en Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1350, en Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
